name: The Lemon Refrigerator Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Angel food cake (10 inch) or a sponge cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Merrill
Use a 10-inch angel food cake or a sponge cake.
1. Combine the slightly beaten egg yolks, sugar, lemon juice, and rind in a double boiler over hot, not boiling water until the mixture coats a spoon.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the gelatin that has been soaked in cold water.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff and gradually add the remaining sugar, beating constantly.
4. Fold in the custard gently.
5. Tear cake into small pieces and arrange in the bottom of a greased tube pan.
6. Pour custard over cake and alternate layers of cake and custard until all is used, ending with a cake layer.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Unmold and serve with whipped cream. You can decorate this dessert with candied cherries or other fruits and nuts if desired.
